---
title: "Teaching"
---

## UT Southwestern Medical Center

<div class="course-entry">
**Health Economics** (HESP 5301) | Course Director and Instructor | Spring 2025, 2026
</div>

<div class="course-entry">
**Health Policy** (HESP 5303) | Course Director and Instructor | Spring 2025, 2026
</div>
